Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Bridget Barrett, 415.433.2261 for Defendant Black Rabbit. (Court call)
No other appearances.

Discussed. The Courts ask if there is an agreement for counsel to withdraw. Ms. Barrett states that the Defendant does not object and that her client received notice of the motion.
The Court also inquires about email communcation. Ms. Barrett states that alll communication with the client has been by email or phone and that a copy of the motion was sent by email and that another attorney for the law firm spoke with the client by phone.

The Court rules follows: DEFENDANT DEANNA SISON Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is granted. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
